title: 6pcs Jar Opener Gripper Pads, Rubber Jar Grippers Multi-function Kitchen Gadget Anti-slip Coasters Bottle Lid Opener Jar Opener for Seniors with Arthritis Weak Hands (6 Colors)
description:
Package Includes: You will get 6 pieces rubber openers in 2 shapes & 6 colors, including 3 round jar opener gripper pads(green, gray, red) and 3 square jar opener gripper pads(light blue, purple, yellow).
Good Helper: Suitable for most jars and bottles, these jar gripper pads have a textured surface that creates more friction with the lids of your jars, provide excellent grip for you to open all sizes of stubborn jars and containers.
Anti-slip Material: The jar opener gripper pad is made of high quality rubber with a soft texture, which determines its durability and flexibility. The rubber material and texture design make it perfectly non-slip.
Easy To Use: Simply place the rubber bottle opener on the lid, rotate the lid as usual, the lid will be easily unscrewed. Ideal for children, seniors and people with weak hands.
Multipurpose: These bottle openers can also be used as coasters, heat insulation pads, anti-scalding mats or wraps for hot lid and hot handle to avoid scalding your hands. It's also a nice home decoration to add some vibrant colors to kitchen.
reviews_5s:
You get square and round. They are nice and thin and boy do they ever grip things ! I have some plastic cutting boards in a drawer and they are always sliding around. Not anymore ! I put one of these grippers under the bottom on and another about halfway up the stack and now they all stay in place. One thing that is great about the super thin ones like these is how much easier they are to grasp when opening jars. A great value for some super little grippers.Love that I have 6 of these now. I have some upstairs and downstairs and jars are easier to grip making the opening easierSo far so good! Have helped me open the bottles that I needed it for. Good value for the money.These are so useful in so many different ways! They help open lids. They give you grip on things that your hands can't hold well. I even used one to hold an espresso cup that was full and I couldn't grip well because the cup was hot. I use one to open up my cats' wet Sheba food that can be a bit messy to open. They're just superb and have so many uses that everyone should have at least one set of these at home and even keep some at work because you never know when you may need one! You can use them as anti-slip mats as well! They're just great!I received the product in good condition. It is a good quality and cost-effective..These gripper pads are light weight, flexible and pretty. They're easy to use and really do help to open stubborn jar lids.I've used these on a few jars. Exactly what I was looking for - the extra grip my old hands need. I heat the lids on stubborn jars and these eliminate any burn risk.I’ve used one of them already a couple of times, and I like them! These days, my finger strength ain’t, but it used to be, so these definitely have, and will come in handy for them stubborn jars that like to remind me of my age lolI admit it….the strength in my hands isn’t what it used to be so I need a little help. These grippers are great to have on hand. I used them to open bottles, a little extra help when I need to grip a screwdriver, need to get a cooled lightbulb out of a stubborn lamp (that’s on me for screwing it in too tight), etc. I have them in the kitchen, garage and toolbox.

This set is particularly nice because it is thicker than some sets and a bit more substantial. Other sets have torn after the first use of two but these are still good as new. The bright colors are fun and help me easily locate them in the drawer or tool box.

Last, good price for a set of six.Affordable pack of cute rubbery pads to use for opening jars, bottles, etc. I didn't realize how little arm strength I have... I was always asking people to help me open things. Now I can open everything on my own. Just toss them in the "junk drawer" in the kitchen and I use them almost daily. Love them.
reviews_1s: Unfortunately these grippers didn’t work for me. I tried opening a typical jar and wouldn’t budge after 3 tries. I tried my regular Norpro gripper and it worked immediately. I will return for a refund.Waste of money. These silicone jar openers rip the first time you use them. I was looking for a replacement for my old Rubbermaid jar/bottle opener which is so old (still works though). I should have requested a refund. I might still, because 3 of them ripped the first time used. I'm donating the other three. Don't waste your money on these. Look for thick rubber ones.These did not open the jars - No gripAs I have lost some strength in my hands, I ordered these, they are cheaply made, two tore the first time I used them. Don't waste your time or money, get the heavy duty ones.The very first thing I tried to open just spun around in the grip. Even using two grips didn't work. Not at all helpful to me. Waste of $$Muy buenasTo thin
